name: Job Scraping → Notion (Airtop)

parameters.name: extraction
parameters.value: Extract all job listings visible on this page. For each job return: title, company, location, posted_date, job_url, brief description. Return as JSON array.

nodes.name: Airtop Scrape Jobs
nodes._notes: Replace with actual Airtop n8n node when available. Add AIRTOP_API_KEY to credentials.

databaseId._note: Replace COMMUNITY_MEMBERS_DB_ID with the actual ID after running create_missing_dbs.py

nodes.name: Add Job Lead to Notion
nodes._notes: This creates job leads as pages. Consider a dedicated Job Leads database for production use.

_notes: SETUP: 1) Import into n8n. 2) Add Airtop API key to credentials. 3) Update COMMUNITY_MEMBERS_DB_ID with real ID from create_missing_dbs.py output. 4) Add Notion credentials. 5) Activate workflow.
